caption: The video features a presentation by Jerry Michalski, who is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen. The main focus of the video is a complex diagram displayed on a computer screen, which appears to be a visual representation of interconnected concepts and processes related to systems thinking and problem-solving. The diagram includes various nodes with labels such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight club," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are connected by arrows, indicating relationships and pathways between different ideas and actions. Jerry seems to be explaining or discussing the content of this diagram, likely elaborating on how these elements interact within a larger framework of understanding and addressing societal issues. The background shows multiple browser tabs open, suggesting that the presentation might be part of a broader discussion or research session.
